channel.title: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Angela seemed proud of what she had done!
item.description: A factual overview examining the events surrounding Angela’s actions, focusing on the investigation and key details with a clear and respectful approach.

media:content.media:description: A factual overview examining the events surrounding Angela’s actions, focusing on the investigation and key details with a clear and respectful approach.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Final Part Of The Sickening Maliyah Bass Case
item.description: The final part of the Maliyah Bass case is examined. A factual and respectful look at how one of the most troubling cases reached its conclusion.

media:content.media:title: Final Part Of The Sickening Maliyah Bass Case
media:content.media:description: The final part of the Maliyah Bass case is examined. A factual and respectful look at how one of the most troubling cases reached its conclusion.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Jesse Butler’s Current Legal Status
item.description: An update on Jesse Butler’s case, outlining his youthful offender supervision status and the current legal framework surrounding his situation.

item.title: From 78 Years to Release: How It Happens
item.description: A look at how sentences can be reduced through appeals, parole, or legal changes, and the processes that can lead to early release.

media:content.media:description: A look at how sentences can be reduced through appeals, parole, or legal changes, and the processes that can lead to early release.
